criteria.text: Creating a new topic file writes content/<fileID>.v1.md
criteria.check: TestContentCreate: read back the file at ContentStore.ContentPath(fileID), assert bytes equal input data

criteria.text: the corresponding catalog mutation is logged to the WAL before the file is considered committed (WAL-before-apply)
criteria.check: TestContentCreate (ordering sub-test): via createWithHook, observe the WAL segment already contains the RecordCatalogPut record while cat.Get still returns ErrNotFound, then confirm cat.Get succeeds after Create returns

criteria.text: go test ./engine/catalog/... -run TestContentCreate -race: create file, assert WAL record precedes catalog visibility, assert content bytes on disk match input
criteria.check: TestContentCreate covers all three assertions in one test function per the test spec
